# Support

If you need help with KINDX, here are the best ways to get it:

## Documentation

- [README](../README.md) -- Quick start, installation, usage, and architecture
- [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) -- How to contribute code, tests, and docs
- [SYNTAX](../reference/SYNTAX.md) -- Query syntax reference
- [CHANGELOG](../CHANGELOG.md) -- What changed in each release

## Getting Help

- **Bug reports**: [Open an issue](https://github.com/ambicuity/KINDX/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
- **Feature requests**: [Open an issue](https://github.com/ambicuity/KINDX/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)
- **Questions and discussion**: [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/ambicuity/KINDX/discussions)
- **Security vulnerabilities**: Email `contact@riteshrana.engineer` (do not open a public issue)

## What NOT to do

- Do not email the maintainer for general support questions -- use GitHub Discussions instead.
- Do not open issues for questions -- use Discussions.
- Do not open duplicate issues -- search existing issues first.

## Response Time

This is a solo-maintained project. Response times are best-effort:

| Request Type | Expected Response |
|-------------|-------------------|
| Security vulnerability | Within 48 hours |
| Bug report (with reproduction) | Within 1 week |
| Feature request | Within 2 weeks |
| General discussion | Best effort |
